n: Instance: The Father of the Sutcrofts

steps.t: Fastred is standing just outside his father's gravesite with Framferth. Fastred wishes to speak to you about his people and his father's legacy.
Fastred is walking through his father's gravesite.
Crúmgam stands at the eastern side of Dagred's Grave. The darkening of the sky has heralded the arrival of a fierce Man of Mordor, Crúmgam. You and Fa…
Fastred is standing outside Dagred's Grave. Having defeated the Orcs brought to his father's grave by Crúmgam, you should return to Snowbourn with Fas…
